subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! Arise to serve with consummate wisdom, for many are the souls whose inner reality differeth from their outer appearance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین بکمال حکمت بخدمت قیام نما بسیار از نفوسند که باطنشان غیر ظاهر است
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @outward and inward meanings, @love of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
